Carrot faced operational challenges following a Drift exploit, leading to shutdown announcements. The project subsequently resumed operations, reopening mint/redeem functions and achieving ~90% liquidity. Project0 experienced a 2.6% drawdown with $57.52 redemption price. Status updates remained pending official Drift communications.

Apologies for the error
